criteria.name: Rename Current Function
criteria.evidence: HEAD preserves the legacy implementation as `def _calculate_fwi_legacy` in src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py:729.

criteria.name: Pipeline Routing Update
criteria.evidence: HEAD routes hourly execution through the new logic in src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py:1252-1286 and the run_pipeline branch beginning near line 1366, with `extended` treated as an alias for `hourly`.

criteria.name: CLI & Config
criteria.evidence: HEAD sets docs/cleaning-config.json `fwi.fwi_mode` to `hourly` and the code default is `fwi_mode: str = "hourly"` in src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py:1252.

criteria.name: Diagnostics
criteria.evidence: HEAD emits `dmc_dc_source_date` in src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py:883 and :913, providing the Phase 12 daily-source audit diagnostic.

criteria.name: Tests
criteria.evidence: `tests/test_phase12_wagner_hourly.py` exists at HEAD, but the mandated `.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -q` run still exits 1. The concrete failure is tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py:192, which still asserts the old Phase 11 default `config["fwi"]["fwi_mode"] == "extended"` and therefore fails against the Phase 12-required `hourly` default.

criteria.name: Output Files
criteria.evidence: HEAD includes `dmc_dc_source_date` support in src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py:883 and :913, satisfying the new hourly output audit-column requirement.

failing_nodes.message: Phase 12 criterion 12.8 failed because the full suite is not green: this Phase 11 regression test still expects `fwi_mode == "extended"` after Phase 12 changed the default to `hourly`.

summary: Lisa review REJECT for Phase 12 on current HEAD 1c09805: the core Phase 12 implementation is present (`_hffmc_calc`, `_daily_dmc_dc_calc`, `calculate_fwi_hourly`, `_calculate_fwi_legacy`, hourly routing, config default, and `dmc_dc_source_date` audit support all exist), artifact validation/pre-flight are SKIP for this phase, and Martin lint contains only medium/low issues. The rejection is now narrow and deterministic: the required full-suite pytest run is still red because tests/test_phase11_dual_mode_fwi.py:192 asserts the obsolete Phase 11 default `extended` instead of the Phase 12-required `hourly`.
